# Content Spotlight Portrait

The Content Spotlight Portrait component displays content with a portrait-oriented image (2:3 aspect ratio), providing a visually prominent way to highlight important information, testimonials, or featured content. It supports flexible positioning, alignment options, and theme customization through the color dial system.

## Interactive Preview

Use the controls panel below to experiment with the content spotlight portrait's properties in real-time.

## Usage Guidelines

### When to Use

- Highlighting individual people, profiles, or testimonials
- Featuring vertical/portrait-oriented imagery
- Creating visual hierarchy with prominent content sections
- Showcasing featured content with portrait-style photography

### Image Considerations

- Use portrait-oriented images (taller than wide)
- Recommended aspect ratio: 2:3
- Ensure images are high quality and properly cropped
- Consider the focal point when choosing image position

## Visual Regression Testing

For comprehensive testing of all theme variations and configurations, see the [Visreg page](?path=/story/molecules-content-spotlight-content-spotlight-portrait-visreg--visreg).
